title: Shri Yamuna Mata Ki Aarti
intro: Read Shri Yamuna Mata Ki Aarti in Hindi and seek the divine blessings of Goddess Yamuna.
description:
Om Jai Yamuna Mata,
Hari Jai Yamuna Mata.
Jo nahave phal paave,
Sukh dukh ki daata॥
॥ Om Jai Yamuna Mata ॥

Pavitra ShriYamuna jal,
Agam bahai dhara,
Jo jan sharan mein aaya,
Kar diya nistara॥
॥ Om Jai Yamuna Mata ॥

Jo jan hi darshan,
Hi nitya snan kare,
Yam ke traas na paave,
Jo nitya dhyan kare॥
॥ Om Jai Yamuna Mata ॥

Kalikal mein mahima jai,
Jai jai mata avatar liyo,
Nitya nirmal jal peekar,
Kans ko maar diyo॥
॥ Om Jai Yamuna Mata ॥

Namo mata bhay harni,
Shubh mangal karni,
Manmohak bhaya hain,
Tum bin vaitarni॥
॥ Om Jai Yamuna Mata ॥
